item.title: WholeClear EML to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear EML to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear EML to PST Converter
(Utilities)
In IT-related businesses, EML to PST Converter is a well-known utility. A capable tool for converting EML files to PST formats is the WholeClear EML to PST converter. As you can see, it can transfer message information to a very user-friendly Microsoft Outlook PST file. The uniqueness of the integrated file is not lost throughout the migration process; it remains exactly as it was before. Additionally, it respects users' preferences for where they expect to keep their data. Your transformed data is carefully preserved during the conversion; there is no longer any data loss.
This program provides the ability to export EML files from Microsoft Outlook Express, Windows Thunderbird, and Live Mail. There is thus no size restriction. With only one click, you can convert files of any size and an infinite number of emails. On MS Outlook 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, 2011, 2010, 2007, 2003, and 2002, it runs quickly. Although it operates more fluidly on a Windows server, Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, 8.1, 10, and 11 all support plain text, rich text for emails, and HTML formats. The message text, URL, attachments, CC and BCC, as well as the receipt date, are all included. Consequently, it is user-friendly. Download a trial version to learn more.


[read more]
item.description:
WholeClear EML to PST Converter
(Utilities)
In IT-related businesses, EML to PST Converter is a well-known utility. A capable tool for converting EML files to PST formats is the WholeClear EML to PST converter. As you can see, it can transfer message information to a very user-friendly Microsoft Outlook PST file. The uniqueness of the integrated file is not lost throughout the migration process; it remains exactly as it was before. Additionally, it respects users' preferences for where they expect to keep their data. Your transformed data is carefully preserved during the conversion; there is no longer any data loss.
This program provides the ability to export EML files from Microsoft Outlook Express, Windows Thunderbird, and Live Mail. There is thus no size restriction. With only one click, you can convert files of any size and an infinite number of emails. On MS Outlook 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, 2011, 2010, 2007, 2003, and 2002, it runs quickly. Although it operates more fluidly on a Windows server, Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, 8.1, 10, and 11 all support plain text, rich text for emails, and HTML formats. The message text, URL, attachments, CC and BCC, as well as the receipt date, are all included. Consequently, it is user-friendly. Download a trial version to learn more.


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
WholeClear EML to PST Converter
(Utilities)
In IT-related businesses, EML to PST Converter is a well-known utility. A capable tool for converting EML files to PST formats is the WholeClear EML to PST converter. As you can see, it can transfer message information to a very user-friendly Microsoft Outlook PST file. The uniqueness of the integrated file is not lost throughout the migration process; it remains exactly as it was before. Additionally, it respects users' preferences for where they expect to keep their data. Your transformed data is carefully preserved during the conversion; there is no longer any data loss.
This program provides the ability to export EML files from Microsoft Outlook Express, Windows Thunderbird, and Live Mail. There is thus no size restriction. With only one click, you can convert files of any size and an infinite number of emails. On MS Outlook 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, 2011, 2010, 2007, 2003, and 2002, it runs quickly. Although it operates more fluidly on a Windows server, Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, 8.1, 10, and 11 all support plain text, rich text for emails, and HTML formats. The message text, URL, attachments, CC and BCC, as well as the receipt date, are all included. Consequently, it is user-friendly. Download a trial version to learn more.


[read more]

item.title: Planes [Board]
item.itunes:title: Planes [Board]
item.itunes:author: xxxcucus
item.itunes:summary:
Planes
(Board)
Position your planes on your game board and guess where the computer has hidden its before it guesses where you have hidden yours.
The open-source app is available for Android, Windows and Linux.
Starting with version 0.4.0 the Android app allows multiplayer games as well.
It is possible to play games between the desktop app and the Android app.

See the website of the project for more informations: https://xxxcucus.github.io/planes/

[read more]
item.description:
Planes
(Board)
Position your planes on your game board and guess where the computer has hidden its before it guesses where you have hidden yours.
The open-source app is available for Android, Windows and Linux.
Starting with version 0.4.0 the Android app allows multiplayer games as well.
It is possible to play games between the desktop app and the Android app.

See the website of the project for more informations: https://xxxcucus.github.io/planes/

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Planes
(Board)
Position your planes on your game board and guess where the computer has hidden its before it guesses where you have hidden yours.
The open-source app is available for Android, Windows and Linux.
Starting with version 0.4.0 the Android app allows multiplayer games as well.
It is possible to play games between the desktop app and the Android app.

See the website of the project for more informations: https://xxxcucus.github.io/planes/

[read more]

item.title: Advanced Youtube Client - AYC [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Advanced Youtube Client - AYC [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: adithyassekhar
item.itunes:summary:
Advanced Youtube Client - AYC
(Utilities)
Github: https://github.com/adithya-s-sekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc
Opencode: https://www.opencode.net/adithyassekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc (This is a WIP importing from Github)

Test out latest featues and bug fixes before everyone: Test builds available on telegram https://t.me/s/ayc_news

AYC is a highly responsive, no nonsense, easy to use, fast video downloader from the text based era.

Features

Supports Youtube, Reddit, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Twitch, Dailymotion, Vimeo and 100s of other websites that yt-dlp supports.
Automatically saves video chapters, thumbnails, subtitles (User configurable).
Supports downloading playlists, channels, keyword topics on multiple websites.
Multithreaded downloads using aria2c to fully utilize the available bandwidth (User configurable).
Batch mode can create jobs, save urls to them and download, resume, edit, delete.
Extremely light and instantly responding text based ui.
Easily editable batch script.
Compatible with Windows 7 SP1/8/8.1/10/11 (32/64-bit).
Downloads only. Does not convert to other formats. All formats are given by the website.
Except for audio. Along with untouched M4A and OPUS audio straight from youtube, there is also a 128k CBR MP3 option.
Everything is designed to help create muscle memory.

Installation
Note: Windows Defender will show a one-time warning before you try to start a batch file downloaded from the internet. You need to click More info and click Run Anyway for it to go away.

Download the latest AYC release from here.
Extract the ayc folder inside to anywhere on your computer (eg: C:\ayc). Do not extract inside Program Files.
Open AYClient.bat and follow the on screen instructions.
When you're done there'll be a shortcut created in ayc folder, on the desktop and in start menu. Open it to start using AYC.
[read more]

AYC is a highly responsive, no nonsense, easy to use, fast video downloader from the text based era.

Supports Youtube, Reddit, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Twitch, Dailymotion, Vimeo and 100s of other websites that yt-dlp supports.
Automatically saves video chapters, thumbnails, subtitles (User configurable).

Batch mode can create jobs, save urls to them and download, resume, edit, delete.
Extremely light and instantly responding text based ui.

Downloads only. Does not convert to other formats. All formats are given by the website.
Except for audio. Along with untouched M4A and OPUS audio straight from youtube, there is also a 128k CBR MP3 option.
Everything is designed to help create muscle memory.

Installation
Note: Windows Defender will show a one-time warning before you try to start a batch file downloaded from the internet. You need to click More info and click Run Anyway for it to go away.

Download the latest AYC release from here.
Extract the ayc folder inside to anywhere on your computer (eg: C:\ayc). Do not extract inside Program Files.
Open AYClient.bat and follow the on screen instructions.
When you're done there'll be a shortcut created in ayc folder, on the desktop and in start menu. Open it to start using AYC.
[read more]

Advanced Youtube Client - AYC
(Utilities)
Github: https://github.com/adithya-s-sekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc
Opencode: https://www.opencode.net/adithyassekhar/advanced-youtube-client-ayc (This is a WIP importing from Github)

Test out latest featues and bug fixes before everyone: Test builds available on telegram https://t.me/s/ayc_news

AYC is a highly responsive, no nonsense, easy to use, fast video downloader from the text based era.

Features

Supports Youtube, Reddit, Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Twitch, Dailymotion, Vimeo and 100s of other websites that yt-dlp supports.
Automatically saves video chapters, thumbnails, subtitles (User configurable).
Supports downloading playlists, channels, keyword topics on multiple websites.
Multithreaded downloads using aria2c to fully utilize the available bandwidth (User configurable).
Batch mode can create jobs, save urls to them and download, resume, edit, delete.
Extremely light and instantly responding text based ui.
Easily editable batch script.
Compatible with Windows 7 SP1/8/8.1/10/11 (32/64-bit).
Downloads only. Does not convert to other formats. All formats are given by the website.
Except for audio. Along with untouched M4A and OPUS audio straight from youtube, there is also a 128k CBR MP3 option.
Everything is designed to help create muscle memory.

Installation
Note: Windows Defender will show a one-time warning before you try to start a batch file downloaded from the internet. You need to click More info and click Run Anyway for it to go away.

Download the latest AYC release from here.
Extract the ayc folder inside to anywhere on your computer (eg: C:\ayc). Do not extract inside Program Files.
Open AYClient.bat and follow the on screen instructions.
When you're done there'll be a shortcut created in ayc folder, on the desktop and in start menu. Open it to start using AYC.
[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Undelete
(Utilities)
Novelty camera data retrieval application is available on www.digitalcameraundelete.com company URL that allows nontechnical user to recover deleted memorable photographs from corrupted digicam and safely stores at user’s specified location in laptop. Digital Camera Undelete software quickly gets back all your deleted media files such as images, snapshot and albums from inaccessible camcorder device in few countable mouse clicks.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Undelete
(Utilities)
Novelty camera data retrieval application is available on www.digitalcameraundelete.com company URL that allows nontechnical user to recover deleted memorable photographs from corrupted digicam and safely stores at user’s specified location in laptop. Digital Camera Undelete software quickly gets back all your deleted media files such as images, snapshot and albums from inaccessible camcorder device in few countable mouse clicks.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Digital Camera Undelete
(Utilities)
Novelty camera data retrieval application is available on www.digitalcameraundelete.com company URL that allows nontechnical user to recover deleted memorable photographs from corrupted digicam and safely stores at user’s specified location in laptop. Digital Camera Undelete software quickly gets back all your deleted media files such as images, snapshot and albums from inaccessible camcorder device in few countable mouse clicks.

[read more]

item.title: KDE CDEmu Manager [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: KDE CDEmu Manager [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: marcel83
item.itunes:summary:
KDE CDEmu Manager
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
KDE CDEmu Manager is a simple frontend for CDEmu.
It provides a small manager window that gives you an overview of your virtual drives and allows you to mount and unmount images.

It also includes a service menu for mounting images directly from Dolphin/Konqueror.

Images can be unmounted like any other media through Dolphin or the Device Notifier.

[b]How to install:[/b]
mkdir build && cd build
cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=`kf5-config --prefix` ..
make
make install (as root)

Translations and feedback are welcome.

Enjoy!
[read more]
item.description:
KDE CDEmu Manager
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
KDE CDEmu Manager is a simple frontend for CDEmu.
It provides a small manager window that gives you an overview of your virtual drives and allows you to mount and unmount images.

It also includes a service menu for mounting images directly from Dolphin/Konqueror.

Images can be unmounted like any other media through Dolphin or the Device Notifier.

[b]How to install:[/b]
mkdir build && cd build
cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=`kf5-config --prefix` ..
make
make install (as root)

Translations and feedback are welcome.

Enjoy!
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
KDE CDEmu Manager
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
KDE CDEmu Manager is a simple frontend for CDEmu.
It provides a small manager window that gives you an overview of your virtual drives and allows you to mount and unmount images.

It also includes a service menu for mounting images directly from Dolphin/Konqueror.

Images can be unmounted like any other media through Dolphin or the Device Notifier.

[b]How to install:[/b]
mkdir build && cd build
cmake -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=`kf5-config --prefix` ..
make
make install (as root)

Translations and feedback are welcome.

Enjoy!
[read more]

item.title: Filind Audio Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Filind Audio Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: ngupiware
item.itunes:summary:
Filind Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Filind is a light free audio player application for Linux and Windows.
Shortcut :
1. Space = Play / Pause
2. Stop = end
3. Next = PageDown
4. Prev = PageUp
5. Volume Up = Shift + =
6. Volume Down = Shift + -
7. Mute = Delete
[read more]
item.description:
Filind Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Filind is a light free audio player application for Linux and Windows.
Shortcut :
1. Space = Play / Pause
2. Stop = end
3. Next = PageDown
4. Prev = PageUp
5. Volume Up = Shift + =
6. Volume Down = Shift + -
7. Mute = Delete
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Filind Audio Player
(Audioplayers)
Filind is a light free audio player application for Linux and Windows.
Shortcut :
1. Space = Play / Pause
2. Stop = end
3. Next = PageDown
4. Prev = PageUp
5. Volume Up = Shift + =
6. Volume Down = Shift + -
7. Mute = Delete
[read more]

item.title: SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits [Security]
item.itunes:title: SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits [Security]
item.itunes:author: ssh-mitm
item.itunes:summary:
SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits
(Security)
ssh mitm server for security audits supporting public key authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits
(Security)
ssh mitm server for security audits supporting public key authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SSH-MITM Server for Security Audits
(Security)
ssh mitm server for security audits supporting public key authentication, session hijacking and file manipulation
[size=150][b]Features[/b][/size]
[list][*]Hijacking and logging of terminal sessions[/*][*]publickey authentication[/*][*]SCP and SFTP (store, replace, inject files)[/*][*]Agent Forwarding[/*][*]Port Forwarding[/*][*]Check and test clients against known vulnerabilities[/*][*]Plugin support[/*][/list]

[size=150][b]Connect to the network[/b][/size]

To start an intercepting mitm-ssh server on Port 10022, all you have to do is run a single command.
[code single]$ ./ssh-mitm-x86_64.AppImage server --remote-host 192.168.0.x[/code]
Now let's try to connect to the ssh-mitm server.
[code single]$ ssh -p 10022 user@proxyserver[/code]
You will see the credentials in the log output.
[code]2021-01-01 11:38:26,098 [INFO] Client connection established with parameters:
Remote Address: 192.168.0.x
Port: 22
Username: user
Password: supersecret
Key: None
Agent: None[/code]

[size=150][b]Hijack SSH sessions[/b][/size]

When a client connects, ssh-mitm starts a new server, which is used for session hijacking.
[code single][INFO] created injector shell on port 34463[/code]
To hijack this session, you can use your favorite ssh client. All you have to do is to connect to the hijacked session.
[code single]$ ssh -p 34463 127.0.0.1[/code]

[b]Full Documentation:[/b] [url=https://docs.ssh-mitm.at]https://docs.ssh-mitm.at[/url]
[read more]

item.title: Transformice [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: Transformice [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: loup
item.itunes:summary:
Transformice
(Jump N Run)
Linux online version of the popular game
Transformice is an MMO Mouse Simulator platformer about dozens of mice running to bring back the cheese, trying to avoid pitfalls, leading to unexpected and hilarious situations!

You have less than two minutes to be the first mouse to bring back the cheese by all means, with the Shaman's help or curse within the multiple game modes and millions levels available: no two games are ever the same!

In this stupidly fun "free to win" game with hats, will you survive the cheese quest? Will the Shaman help or ruin everything? Join the 55 million people who already tried!
[read more]
item.description:
Transformice
(Jump N Run)
Linux online version of the popular game
Transformice is an MMO Mouse Simulator platformer about dozens of mice running to bring back the cheese, trying to avoid pitfalls, leading to unexpected and hilarious situations!

You have less than two minutes to be the first mouse to bring back the cheese by all means, with the Shaman's help or curse within the multiple game modes and millions levels available: no two games are ever the same!

In this stupidly fun "free to win" game with hats, will you survive the cheese quest? Will the Shaman help or ruin everything? Join the 55 million people who already tried!
[read more]

Transformice
(Jump N Run)
Linux online version of the popular game
Transformice is an MMO Mouse Simulator platformer about dozens of mice running to bring back the cheese, trying to avoid pitfalls, leading to unexpected and hilarious situations!

You have less than two minutes to be the first mouse to bring back the cheese by all means, with the Shaman's help or curse within the multiple game modes and millions levels available: no two games are ever the same!

In this stupidly fun "free to win" game with hats, will you survive the cheese quest? Will the Shaman help or ruin everything? Join the 55 million people who already tried!
[read more]

item.title: WholeClear Outlook PST Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:title: WholeClear Outlook PST Converter [File Management]
item.itunes:author: ellasmith
item.itunes:summary:
WholeClear Outlook PST Converter
(File Management)
WholeClear Outlook PST Converter is powerful software that offers a comprehensive solution for converting Outlook PST mailboxes to various file formats. The PST Mailbox Converter facilitates the conversion of Outlook PST mailboxes to multiple file formats such as EML, MSG, MBOX, EMLX, VCF, PDF, NSF, HTML, MHTML, and more. Users can efficiently migrate their emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, notes, and other mailbox items to the selected format, providing seamless data portability. The tool supports bulk conversion, allowing users to convert multiple PST mailboxes in a single operation, and ensures efficient and time-saving conversion. It accurately preserves email attributes, folder structure, attachments, metadata, and other relevant information. The software features an intuitive and user-friendly interface, making it accessible to users with varying levels of technical expertise.

[read more]
item.description:
WholeClear Outlook PST Converter
(File Management)
WholeClear Outlook PST Converter is powerful software that offers a comprehensive solution for converting Outlook PST mailboxes to various file formats. The PST Mailbox Converter facilitates the conversion of Outlook PST mailboxes to multiple file formats such as EML, MSG, MBOX, EMLX, VCF, PDF, NSF, HTML, MHTML, and more. Users can efficiently migrate their emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, notes, and other mailbox items to the selected format, providing seamless data portability. The tool supports bulk conversion, allowing users to convert multiple PST mailboxes in a single operation, and ensures efficient and time-saving conversion. It accurately preserves email attributes, folder structure, attachments, metadata, and other relevant information. The software features an intuitive and user-friendly interface, making it accessible to users with varying levels of technical expertise.

[read more]

Users can efficiently migrate their emails, contacts, calendars, tasks, notes, and other mailbox items to the selected format, providing seamless data portability. The tool supports bulk conversion, allowing users to convert multiple PST mailboxes in a single operation, and ensures efficient and time-saving conversion. It accurately preserves email attributes, folder structure, attachments, metadata, and other relevant information. The software features an intuitive and user-friendly interface, making it accessible to users with varying levels of technical expertise.

[read more]
